payload.answer: I can offer repair options for this weather observation, but I will not commit it as durable memory here.
repair_options: Add as a separate current-weather observation: “Today’s weather is cloudy.”
Keep it as an ephemeral note without saving to durable memory.
If you meant a broader pattern, rephrase it as a recurring weather preference or location-specific climate fact.
Ignore this update and make no memory change.
